constraints: Total number of cells in one cube  doesn't exceed **216**
content.inputFormat: The first line of the input contains an integer **T** denoting the number of test cases. Each of the next **T** lines contain two integer **N** and **D**.
content.outputFormat: Output **T** lines. Every line should contain one integer -  the minimal number of unfriendly people among all the possible routes Boris will have to meet for the corresponding test case.
